title: Gaussian beam focus preview
natural_language_goal_en: Preview Gaussian beam propagation and thin-lens focusing for a 1064 nm beam, including waist, Rayleigh range, and focused spot estimate without calling external tools.
natural_language_goal_zh: 预览 1064 nm 高斯光束的传播和薄透镜聚焦，给出光腰、瑞利长度和焦斑估计，不调用外部工具。
default_assumptions: No aberration, clipping, or vector-field effects.

monitor_model.observable: beam radius and focused waist preview
monitor_model.notes: Calculator metadata only; no field monitor was executed.

default_source_assumptions: Default to a 1064 nm scalar Gaussian beam when not specified.
Default waist is 10 um for propagation preview.
default_monitor_assumptions: Default monitor is focal spot / beam radius preview.
suggested_adapter: local Gaussian beam calculator; no solver adapter required
evidence_boundary: Paraxial Gaussian formulas only; not a vector diffraction or full lens validation.
next_actions: Confirm beam waist, wavelength, and focal length.
Inspect Rayleigh range and focused waist estimates.
Use a diffraction or ray-trace solver later if aperture/aberration effects matter.

optical_language_summary.geometry_model: paraxial Gaussian beam plus ideal thin lens
optical_language_summary.evidence_boundary: Paraxial Gaussian formulas only; not a vector diffraction or full lens validation.
